ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number assigned to the incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the incident occurred */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block where the incident took place */,
  "iucr" INTEGER /* Illinois Uniform Crime Reporting code */,
  "primary_type" TEXT /* Primary type of crime (e.g., THEFT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "arrest" INTEGER /* Indicates if an arrest was made */,
  "domestic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the incident is domestic in nature */,
  "beat" INTEGER /* Beat assigned to the incident */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District in which the incident occurred */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Ward number for the area of the incident */,
  "community_area_number" INTEGER /* Community area number */,
  "fbicode" INTEGER /* FBI code for the crime type */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate for mapping */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate for mapping */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location as a coordinate pair */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "suspect_age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect */,
  "suspect_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "evidence_details" TEXT /* Details of evidence collected */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_iucr FOREIGN KEY ("iucr") REFERENCES crime_types ("iucr"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_beat FOREIGN KEY ("beat") REFERENCES police_beats ("beat_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_community_area_number FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_number") REFERENCES community_areas ("area_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the crime type */,
  "iucr" INTEGER /* Illinois Uniform Crime Reporting code */,
  "primary_type" TEXT /* Primary type of crime */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area */,
  "area_number" INTEGER /* Number of the community area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the community area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the community area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_beats" (
  "beat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police beat */,
  "beat_number" INTEGER /* Number of the police beat */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District the beat is part of */,
  "officer_in_charge" TEXT /* Name of the officer in charge of the beat */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the beat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Initial, Follow-up) */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the person reporting the incident */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details or comments regarding the report */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* References to attached files (e.g., photos, documents) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)
